info.title: Qualiobee API
info.description: Authentication is done through an API key specified with a "x-api-key" header in your requests. To generate an API key, connect to the application and go to the "Paramètres organisation" > "Connexions externes" menu.

200.description: The request went well and returned your access token

get.description: Note that it polls up to 24 hours ago

parameters.name: withDeleted
parameters.description: Specifies that you want to retreive deleted data or not

parameters.name: relations
parameters.description: The relations of an objective you want to include in the response. Concatenate relations with a dot to go deeper and get more data at once.

parameters.name: propName
parameters.description: Which property you want to poll objectives from

200.description: The request went well and returned the objectives in question correctly

400.description: One or several query params are incorrect

get.description: Note that the availables filters can be combined as a conditional AND

parameters.name: withDeleted
parameters.description: Specifies that you want to retreive deleted data or not

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number to retreive

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of results to retreive per page

parameters.name: relations
parameters.description: The relations of an objective you want to include in the response. Concatenate relations with a dot to go deeper and get more data at once.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: Filters objectives by uuid (only one objective will be returned in the response)

parameters.name: externalId
parameters.description: The id of the objective in the external application (only for data importation)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the objective of the formation or session

parameters.name: indexOrder
parameters.description: The order of the objective in wich it appears

200.description: The request went well and returned the objectives correctly

400.description: One or several query params are incorrect

200.description: The objective was created successfully

400.description: One or several data in the body are incorrect

parameters.description: Specifies that you want to retreive deleted data or not

parameters.name: relations
parameters.description: Specifies which related entities to include in the response for this qualiobee. You can provide relation paths (concatenated with dots) to fetch nested data, up to a maximum depth of 4. For available relation paths, refer to the documentation for `PublicQualiobeeResponse`

parameters.description: Specifies which related entities to include in the response for this learning session date. You can provide relation paths (concatenated with dots) to fetch nested data, up to a maximum depth of 4. For available relation paths, refer to the documentation for `PublicLearning session dateResponse`

parameters.name: externalId
parameters.description: The id of the dates in the external application (only for data importation)

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: Filters learning session dates by uuid (only one session date will be returned in the response)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filters learning session dates by type

parameters.name: startAt
parameters.description: Filters learning session dates by start day and hours

parameters.name: endAt
parameters.description: Filters learning session dates by end day and hours

parameters.name: elearningHours
parameters.description: Filters learning session dates by the amount of hours as e-learning

parameters.name: remoteTool
parameters.description: Filters learning session dates by remote software name

parameters.name: remoteLink
parameters.description: Filters learning session dates by remote software unique link

200.description: The request went well and returned the learning session dates correctly

400.description: One or several query params are incorrect

post.summary: Creates a new learning session date

200.description: The learning session date was created successfully

400.description: One or several data in the body are incorrect

parameters.name: withDeleted
parameters.description: Specifies that you want to retreive deleted data or not

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number to retreive

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of results to retreive per page

parameters.name: relations
parameters.description: Specifies which related entities to include in the response for this session. You can provide relation paths (concatenated with dots) to fetch nested data, up to a maximum depth of 4. For available relation paths, refer to the documentation for `PublicSessionResponse`

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: Filters sessions by uuid (only one session will be returned in the response)

parameters.name: externalId
parameters.description: The id of the sessions in the external application (only for data importation)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filters sessions by name

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Filters sessions by description

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Filters sessions by state. See SessionStateEnum schema for more details about the enumeration

parameters.name: usingSignature
parameters.description: Filters sessions to get only the ones using electronic signature for presences or not

parameters.name: usingSignatureMedia
parameters.description: Filters sessions to get only the ones using electronic signature for documents or not

parameters.name: usingBeehelp
parameters.description: Filters sessions to get only the ones using Beehelp or not

parameters.name: subtractType
parameters.description: Filters sessions by subtract type. See SubtractTypeEnum schema for more details about the enumeration

parameters.name: specialtyCode
parameters.description: Filters sessions by specialty code (between 100 and 423)

parameters.name: certifType
parameters.description: Filters sessions by certification type. See CertifTypeEnum schema for more details about the enumeration

parameters.name: certifLevel
parameters.description: Filters sessions by certification level. See CertifLevelEnum schema for more details about the enumeration

200.description: The request went well and returned the sessions correctly

400.description: One or several query params are incorrect

post.description: Note that you can't create a session from an incomplete formation

200.description: The session was created successfully

400.description: One or several data in the body are incorrect

parameters.name: withDeleted
parameters.description: Specifies that you want to retreive deleted data or not

parameters.name: relations
parameters.description: Specifies which related entities to include in the response for this session. You can provide relation paths (concatenated with dots) to fetch nested data, up to a maximum depth of 4. For available relation paths, refer to the documentation for `PublicSessionResponse`. Concatenate relations with a dot to go deeper and get more data at once.

200.description: The request went well and returned the session correctly

400.description: One or several query params are incorrect

patch.description: For now you can't update a started session, comming soon

200.description: The session was updated successfully

400.description: One or several data in the body are incorrect

delete.description: Note that you can't delete a started session

200.description: The session was deleted successfully
The session was started successfully

400.description: One or several data in the body are incorrect

delete.description:
Note that you can't delete a Location which is related to a Learner, Customer or SessionDate.
Moreover, this end-point does not really delete the location but rather archive it. Consider using archiveDate to identify a 'deleted' location.

200.description: The location was deleted successfully

delete.description:
Note that :
- You can't delete a learner who is an individual, you must use customer end-points to do so for now
- You can't delete a learner who has participated to at least one started session

200.description: The learner was deleted successfully
